strengths: 15+ years of hands-on engineering across software, hardware, and infrastructure with consistent technical depth and adaptability across stacks (TypeScript, DLang, C++, Node.js, etc.)
Proven AI-agent infrastructure and tooling contributions at re:cinq, including MCP code generators — directly aligning with AI-powered product development responsibilities
Entrepreneurial track record with GISCollective, a self-driven open-source platform adopted by real-world organizations, demonstrating initiative, systems thinking, and community impact
concerns: No explicit mention of a Master’s or PhD in an AI-related field, though practical AI experience is demonstrated
Limited public evidence of direct cloud platform design or deployment at scale (AWS CDK used, but not framed as cloud architecture leadership)
German language proficiency is listed as basic, which may pose minor operational friction in a Berlin-based role requiring partner engagement
response.justification: Bogdan’s 15+ years of deep, hands-on engineering across diverse domains — including direct contributions to AI-agent infrastructure, open-source platform leadership via GISCollective, and fluency in cloud-adjacent tooling like AWS CDK and Docker — align powerfully with the role’s demand for strategic AI innovation and technical inspiration; his entrepreneurial mindset and proven ability to build and evangelize technical solutions make him a compelling fit despite lacking a formal AI advanced degree.
